nodes.name: ⏰ 6:45 AM ET Weekdays
nodes.notes: 6:45 AM ET = 11:45 UTC. Adjust if server timezone differs.

meta.notes: RSG Morning Briefing v3 | NO Manus, NO AI credits | Data sources: Notion (Tasks DB, Aggregate NB Pipeline) + NowCerts (renewals + claims) | Schedule: 6:45 AM ET = 11:45 UTC | Cron: 45 11 * * 1-5 | n8n vars required: NOWCERTS_API_KEY, NOWCERTS_URL | Notion cred: notionApi | Slack cred: slackApi | OpenClaw integration: add as additional data source node when ready
